title: Fix infinite redirect loop after sign-in on Safari with third-party cookies blocked
description: Users on Safari 17+ report being redirected back to the sign-in page immediately after entering their credentials. Seems related to SameSite=Lax cookie behavior when the auth callback runs on a different subdomain. Need to investigate session cookie settings and possibly switch to SameSite=None with Secure.
author: alice

title: Add CSV export functionality for tasks with filter-aware column selection
description: Users need to be able to download their current board view as a CSV. The export should respect any active filters (status, tag, assignee) and let users pick which columns to include.
author: alice

title: Investigate and resolve slow board load times for workspaces with 500+ tasks
description: Several enterprise customers report 3+ second load times on boards. Need to profile, add pagination or virtualization, and optimize Prisma queries. Possibly introduce a task index.
author: bob

title: Subtask: profile existing board queries with Prisma query logging
description: Enable query logging in dev, run against a realistic dataset, and identify N+1 patterns or missing indexes.
author: bob

title: Subtask: add cursor-based pagination to board task list
description: Limit initial page to 50 tasks and load more on scroll.
author: bob

title: Write setup documentation for self-hosted S3-compatible storage (MinIO)
description: Step-by-step guide including bucket creation, CORS config, IAM permissions, and env var setup.
author: carol

title: Dark mode polish pass across all dashboard pages
description: Fix contrast issues in the sidebar, task cards, and modal dialogs. Ensure all focus states are visible.
author: alice

title: Build in-app notification center with real-time updates via Server-Sent Events
description: Inbox view showing assignment changes, comments, status updates. Should support marking all as read and filtering by type.
author: alice

title: Implement two-factor authentication using TOTP (Google Authenticator compatible)
description: Generate QR codes for setup, verify 6-digit codes on sign-in, provide backup recovery codes.
author: bob

title: Set up application monitoring and alerting with OpenTelemetry + Grafana
description: Traces, metrics, and error tracking. Define SLOs for sign-in latency and board load times.
author: dave

title: Automate nightly Postgres backups with 30-day retention and restore testing
author: dave

title: Redesign the new-user onboarding flow to reduce drop-off between steps 2 and 3
description: Analytics show 40% drop-off when we ask for workspace details. Explore progressive disclosure and skip options.
author: bob

title: Design illustrated empty states for boards, sprints, and team pages
description: Friendly, on-brand illustrations. Should work in both light and dark mode.
author: eve

title: Mobile responsiveness audit across all dashboard pages on iOS and Android
author: eve

title: Conduct 10 user interviews with power users about sprint planning workflow
author: bob

title: Prototype a system theme switcher with custom accent color picker
author: alice

title: Experiment: use an LLM to auto-summarize long task comment threads
author: carol

title: Record a 2-minute demo video showing the full Crest workflow end-to-end
author: eve
